recommendations.title: A Man Called Otto
recommendations.overview: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: St. Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose parents just divorced finds an unlikely friend and mentor in the misanthropic, bawdy, hedonistic, war veteran who lives next door.

recommendations.title: Baby Mama
recommendations.overview: A successful, single businesswoman who dreams of having a baby discovers she is infertile and hires a working class woman to be her unlikely surrogate.

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: Father Frost
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about a conceited young man and a young woman with a tyrannical step-mother, who must overcome magical trials in order to be together.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.overview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: My First Summer
recommendations.overview: Isolated on a remote property, 16-year-old Claudia finds her world transformed when a spirited girl named Grace wanders into her garden.

recommendations.title: The Starling
recommendations.overview: A woman adjusting to life after a loss contends with a feisty bird that's taken over her garden — and a husband who's struggling to find a way forward.
